overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a red dress interacting with a street food vendor at night, then walking through a neon-lit urban environment beneath elevated highways. The scene showcases cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards, neon storefronts, and mixed modern/industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food cart on urban sidewalk

agents.ego_description: standing at a food cart conversing with the vendor while pedestrians occasionally pass by

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food cart preparing items

entered.detail: mobile food cart with illuminated menu display and cooking equipment
large yellow-orange umbrella covering the food cart
large digital billboard displaying health warning with blue background
large tree with dense foliage on the sidewalk edge
blue and orange neon lights illuminating building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, centered on a food cart with a large yellow umbrella. The vendor stands behind the cart while the character in a red dress waits nearby. Neon lights from surrounding buildings cast colorful reflections, and a large health warning billboard is visible in the background. Pedestrians occasionally walk past in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: character begins walking away from food cart, transitioning from stationary to moving
enters covered sidewalk area beneath elevated highway overpass, lighting becomes darker and more enclosed

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, transitioning from open plaza to covered walkway beneath the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in heavy coat walking past the camera on the right

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes
short black and yellow posts lining the sidewalk edge
concrete elevated highway structure overhead with support columns
chain link fence with concrete base along the left side
green glowing medical cross sign on building facade
illuminated advertisement screen showing product imagery
bags of garbage and debris stacked against the fence

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the food cart across an open crosswalk, then enters a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to a darker, enclosed walkway lined with security fences, neon medical signs, and digital billboards. The camera follows steadily as the character passes trash piles and storefronts, with cars visible on the road to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, open-air street corner into the shadowed depths of an urban underpass. It begins on a neon-lit sidewalk centered on a food cart with a large yellow umbrella, where a character in a red dress waits beneath the glow of a massive health warning billboard. As the character turns and walks away from the vendor, the camera tracks her across an open crosswalk, moving from the bright reflections of the main street toward a more enclosed environment. The scene then shifts beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, where the open sky is replaced by a darker walkway lined with security fences, trash piles, and glowing medical signs. The movement finally carries the character deeper into this industrial corridor, passing digital billboards and passing traffic as the atmosphere becomes increasingly claustrophobic.
